sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78637" key="parapo/rfuros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραπόρφῠρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n78637.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">edged with purple</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.46</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.42</biblScope> </bibl> ; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰ π. τῶν ἰσχίων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.39</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
